exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Full FA body including Lease Rider and Internet/Social Media/Telephone Assignment.

exhibits.name: Multi-State Addenda
exhibits.notes: Includes Illinois, Minnesota, and Virginia addenda. Illinois imposes initial-fee deferral due to franchisor's financial condition.

exhibits.name: Unlimited Guaranty and Assumption of Obligations
Nondisclosure, Non-Solicitation and Noncompete Agreement
exhibits.notes: Referenced in Item 15 as mandatory for CEO/School Administrator and other designated individuals.

exhibits.name: Table of Contents of Confidential Brand Standards Manual
exhibits.notes: 242 total pages across six sections (Preface/Intro 32; Establishing Franchise Business 76; Personnel 77; Admin Procedures 13; Daily Procedures 17; Selling & Marketing 27).

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Text layer empty beyond exhibit headers. IMAGE-ONLY — requires vision OCR to recover balance sheet, income statement, cash flow, auditor name, opinion type, going-concern language. NOT RECOVERED in this automation run.

exhibits.name: Current Franchisees (per TOC)
exhibits.notes: NOT PRESENT as a labeled exhibit in the body. TOC lists K = 'Current Franchisees' but body labels the franchisee list as EXHIBIT L. Material labeling contradiction.

exhibits.name: Current and Former Franchisees (per body label)
exhibits.notes: Body label is 'EXHIBIT L — CURRENT AND FORMER FRANCHISEES', but TOC labels this as K. Contains current-franchisees list (as of Jan 1, 2025), schools not yet opened, and former franchisees sections. PII; not re-emitted.

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates page
exhibits.notes: Lists registration/effective status per state. CA/HI/MD/NY/ND/RI/SD/WA 'Not registered'; IL/MI/VA/WI 'Pending'; IN Mar 28, 2025; MN May 9, 2025.

exhibit_label_integrity.description: TOC (p7) lists exhibits A through M and names K as 'Current Franchisees' and L as 'Franchisee Disclosure Questionnaire'. Body labels the current-franchisee list as EXHIBIT L and contains no exhibit labeled K. The Questionnaire exhibit is not labeled in the body. State-effective-dates page (205) is not labeled as any exhibit.
